choices: To the other side of the park
1.content:
Its been half of a year since Timothy has left his home and for an ant-size boy like him it wasn't like he just got up and left. He was swept up by the strong wind that happened that faithful. Luckily for him, he was used to be a speck in his home and having to survive not getting stepped on or eaten by his family so his survival skills are quite handy for himself. On this journey of his he learned a couple of new things about himself. Hes able to withstand a huge amount of pressure and being attacked by predators of the insect world. Which to him it means he is indestructible and another fun fact he learned he can understand all insects making him never lonely in this gigantic world.

For the past months, he has been living within the tall grass within a far section of the city's park that has been neglected by the park ranger and the citizens of the city allowing the bugs to fully take over. From the bugs, he learned new survival skills them. Yet due to his sense for adventure, he longs for more so that on that day he decided to venture on.

Timothy hops onto a nearby fly and asks it for a ride. The fly at first refused by soon gave in as it flew off to the distant allowing Timothy the adventure he has always wanted.

Where did they go?
1.title: The Start of it all

choices: The Hair of the Young Boy
In Between the bulging pecs of the father
Ontop of a hot dog being handed to the sweaty jogger
In the Tray of the Formal Man
11.content:
A few moments go by as Timothy looks around and smiles as he looks at all the people in the park. As the fly soars around Timothy notices a couple of people sticking around. A young boy playing in the playground, a tall hairy muscular man with a beard in a loose white t-shirt with a navy blue button-up striped shirt telling the same boy in the playground that they are leaving soon. In a bench nearby is a very formal looking man eating food from a tray he got from the food truck. Lastly is a sweaty muscular man wearing skin-tight clothing ordering a hot dog from the hot dog stand.

Just then a large blue jay is flying right behind Timothy and The Fly that when the fly finally reacted it managed to knock Timothy right off of it. "Oh god, I knew shouldn't be staring at the other people" spoke Timothy under his breath as he looks where he is heading.
11.title: To the other side of the park

111.content:
Timothy screams as he is falling at a rapid speed as he sees where he is heading. Timothy embraces for impact as he falls into the wavy short brown hair of a young boy who’s currently running around playing with the kids his age. From above you remember that this boy looked about 11 or 12 you figured you wouldn’t want to spend the beginning of your adventure trapped in the brown forest that is this kid’s hair. “I need to find a way out of here” you start venturing through the forest lost.
After a while you hear the child’s voice saying “okay Dad I’m on my way” which used to guide yourself out of the forest.

Does Timothy finds his way out or will he be lost in this kid’s hair for quite a while.
111.title: The Hair of the Young Boy

choices: Irrelevant; Tim's grip slips and he falls down towards the father's lower body
112.content:
Timothy hurtled through the air and saw he was heading straight for the father of the boy. He was in his mid-30s, very tall, masculine, with a great beard and, clearly, bulging pecs that Timothy crashed right into. Tim yelled out in pain as he hit the chest of this giant man, but was able to prevent himself falling for now by grabbing onto the massive tree-sized strand of the chest hair. As the father walks with his son back to the car his pecs began to bounce with each step as Timothy holds on with all his strength.

But had the handsome, bear-like father noticed the impact on his chest?
112.title: The bulging pecs of the father

choices: Timothy lands in front of the man's crotch
The giant father notices the disturbance - what does he do?
1122.content:
He hadn't noticed, which Timothy supposed was a relief - it was too early in his adventure to be spotted by some giant, even one as powerful and handsome as this dad. Timothy kept hold of the shirt as tightly as he could, praying he wouldn't be noticed. The giant began to set off and Tim did his absolute best to keep his grip.

Before long Timothy heard a car door slam and the noise of the park drifted away to be replaced with the roar of an engine and the father's son complaining about something. "Quiet," the father chided him in his baritone voice, and Timothy shivered at the confident authority it exuded. This led to a momentary lapse of concentration, and his grip on the hair slipped. He began to fall down the body of the man.
1122.title: No

choices: Timothy falls on the fathers crotch as he sits down to watch tv
Timothy manages to grab a strand of hair as the father goes to cook
The Father heads to his room as Timothy dangles from a strand of hair
11223.content:
The father felt a minuscule itch on his pec and instead of plucking it out to check it he presses his finger against the itch and begins rubbing it. Timothy’s scream is muffled as he is being rubbed against the hairy pecs of the powerful titanic father. Timothy soon then ended up tangled up in the hairy chest as the father sighs quietly in relief and drives off.

Timothy tries to wiggle free but he was stuck with no chance of freedom. So he eventually stood still and let what happen happens and after. Awhile he hears the father and the child leaving the car and entering the house. Timothy tries once more to break free to se what’s happening. eventually he began falling.
11223.title: Just an Itch

choices: Still hadn't noticed Tim. So what does Tim do about being on the crotch?
112231.content: Just as Tim was falling off, the father was sitting down to watch TV; Tim, expecting a devastating fall all the way to the carpeted floor, instead had a much softer landing on the giant dad's grey trackpants. He landed comfortably in the soft fabric and, taking a second to get his bearings, realised where he was. He was sat on the giant's crotch reason. Below him, Tim was sure, was a huge, hairy beast, separated from by just two layers of cloth. Tim saw the TV flick on, but his rapidly beating heart drew his attention to the biggest potential threat - the giant himself. Praying he still hadn't been noticed, Tim stared up, and up, at the giant's face, who...
112231.title: Timothy falls on his crotch

choices: Try to get off, fast! Maybe escape the house to continue adventuring elsewhere.
1122311.content:
Fortunately for Tim he was now lying on this big guy's grey sweatpants, and the giant was blissfully unaware. He was sat back with his beer, relaxing. Barely daring to breathe, Tim stared up at the giant's impassive face, barely visible from this angle due to the significant beard. He really was a very attractive, masculine guy.

So Tim had managed to get to his crotch without detection. What did he do now?
1122311.title: Still hadn't noticed Tim.

1122312.content:
Tim looked up to see the giant man's heavily-bearded face staring down at him, wearing a look of total surprise.

Uh-oh, thought Tim.

Before Tim could react, all light was blocked out by the giant's hand as it carefully reached for Tim; thumb and index finger pressed in on him painfully and he was lifted the enormous distance from leg to face so he could get a closer look at you.

The dad examined you curiously, eyes narrowed, a sense of wonder and awe on his face. He opened his mouth to speak, when Suddenly you both heard a noise as his son came in. The giant...
1122312.title: Had seen Tim. What now?!

choices: Towards the two handsome guys, potentially gay
Towards the outdoor gym, full of jocks working out in the sun
Towards the ice-cream stand with the handsome vendor and a long line of people
Towards the sea! Time for a swim - and who knows what's under there!
12.content:
After a while of flying, Tim dozed off, but eventually he was woken up by the sound of a frisebee flying just overhead. He looked around and realised the fly had flown him all the way to the beach!

Tim shrugged, pretty excited by this development. His family had never let him go anywhere on his own, really, let alone the beach! He asked the fly to slow down a little and the fly acquiesced, slowing down just enough for him to get a good bead on what was going on. It was a busy day. There was an African-American family of 3 nearby; two sons, one an older teenager of maybe 18, a handsome father who didn't look much older than 40. Two Caucasian males lying very close to each other, both looking fairly masculine, one easily 6'4''; not displaying much outward affection but clearly together, but Tim guessed they might be gay; and some muscular hunky jock-types exercising at a small outdoor gym right next to the beach itself.

The fly, though, was headed for an ice-cream stand, which included a surprisingly handsome vendor, also Timothy's age, and a loooooong line of people of all sorts of backgrounds and with all sorts of different companions - friends, families, what looked like two members of a sports team given their matching outfits... so many different people he could drop in on. Timothy had a choice - where could he go? He could more or less go anywhere, see anyone - become an almost literal fly on the wall of ANYBODY'S life. It was a strange kind of power, especially for one so small.

So where was that power going to take Timothy today? The world was his oyster.
12.title: Beach

choices: to land somewhere on the father.
to land somewhere on the older son
land on their stuff + hitch a ride home with them, or go elsewhere (your choice)
121.content:
The family was handsome. The father, probably in his late 30s, was bald with a goatee and very tall. His son, 18, was slightly shorter but it was a matter of a few centimetres. Both easily exceeded 6 foot. The little brother, who Tim guessed was about 12, was playing in the seat, while the two adults were talking. It seemed to be an animated discussion.

Timothy decided...
121.title: Towards the African American family

1212.content: Timothy felt a massive attraction for the eldest son. Maybe it was the bulging pecs and how it shines in the summer sun or the charming deep voice of the son that soooth the mightest of beasts. He learned a couple things from listening. The eldest son is Jaquan and he’s a college student studying to be a businessman. With no further a due Timothy leaps off the fly landing with a gentle thud he starts planning his first ever adventure on this amazing muscular titanic god
1212.title: to land somewhere on the older son

12121.content:
Jacquan's hair was thick, close-cropped and curly so it was easy to get a handhold once inside. It would also be harder to see, or feel, Timothy if he stared there. He landed in the forest of hair and stared out. He practically had the same point of view as the giant himself now and stared out at the handsome father ahead of him, talking to the giant about college. Jacquan's booming voice came from below. "The basketball team WANT me, Dad. It's not just me giving up my studies. They WANT me on the team. That's a big deal!"
"Your degree is a bigger deal," came the dad's baritone voice. "Just make sure you stay focussed on that."
You could almost FEEL Jacquan rolling his eyes beneath you. "Yes sir," he said with a note of resentment in his voice.
"Good. Anyway, let's..."
12121.title: Into Jacquan’s short curly hair

121211.content:
Jaquan couldn't have stood up any quicker upon hearing his dad's words. Tim clung onto the hair desperately but its thickness meant he was able to stay put relatively easily. Jaquan took huge strides as he walked a few metres away from the beach chair and called out "hey, shrimp! We're going!" to his brother. Timothy put his fingers in his ears, staggered by the giant's booming voice.

Tim kept up his grip as Jaquan bent down and started packing away some of his stuff, holding it all easily in a bag. Then the family returned to the car, chatting quietly with his father. Soon enough they were in the car, with Jaquan sitting in the front seat and his little brother in the back. Timothy was excited to see the giants' home! He was attracted to both the father and the son and right now they were both blissfully unaware of his presence as a stowaway.

When they got home, Jaquan...
121211.title: ...go home."

choices: The Bearded Hairy God lifting the weights
The Young “Military” Man doing bench presses
The Tattooed Titan doing pull ups
123.content:
Timothy guided the fly towards the colossal bodybuilders working out. Timothy took a look around while on the back of the fly and noticed they’re quite a few of people here and all of them were shirtless. Timothy’s eyes sparkle as he looks at all the sweaty hot titans. At first, he only saw them on tv but now he can see them in their full beautiful glory. Timothy decided it was best for him to get on with his adventure and take a look around. The Giant closest to him seemed to be lifting massive weights that even if Timothy was the size of a normal human he still couldn’t lift something that big. The giant lifting it up had a short beard and hair all over his chest along with a golden chain necklace. The muscles on this giant are incredibly big and very defined even though every inch of this giant is covered in hair Tim could still see the muscles underneath. Timothy kept on guiding the fly to the other giants as he decided to check out the rest before deciding. There was a giant doing bench presses who seem to be a bit older than Timothy. The giant had barely any hair on his body but the muscles were just as defined as the previous titan. Each muscle bulges at just the right spots and from Timothy’s perspective, he noticed that the giant had one massive butt that seems like it can rip out the workout shorts that the giant is wearing. Along with the shorts the giant seemed to be sporting a pair of dog tags around his neck that shines with the sunlight which gave Timothy the impression that this giant might be in the military or at least knew someone in it. Lastly, the giant in the far corner who seemed to be the same age as the first giant is doing pull-ups with such ease. The giant was sporting the normal attire here a pair of workout shorts and even have a similar body type as the other giants but unlike the others, this giant had a large tattoo of a snake and a skull on his right arm along with some faint scars. Which gave Timothy the impression that this giant may either know some really strong people or had a very tough life. But he could be wrong.

So with that figured out Timothy decided to choose himself a giant to spend the rest of his adventure with.
123.title: Towards the outdoor gym, full of jocks working ...

choices: Take a short break before moving on with the workout
take a short break before continuing lifting the weights.
1232.content:
Timothy had decided to spend his time with the hot young giant so he guided the fly towards the bench pressing area. As they got closer the light from the sun began to reflect of the giant's dog tag and striking the fly causing it to jerk to the right in sudden shock but due to the sudden movement. Timothy falls off the fly and starts falling at a rapid speed. He screams to the top of his lungs but due to him being very miniature no one seemed to hear as Timothy crash lands onto the young giant's sweaty left pec. "Ughhh. I should've realized the light from this dude's necklace would blind us..." sighs Timothy as he tries to stand up but instantly fell back down because the skin of this giant is sweaty. Timothy then looks off to the distance towards the giant he landed as he watches the god lifting the weights with minimal struggle. But before Timothy could say anything the titan puts the weight back on the stand and began to sit up causing Timothy to start sliding down the pec. "Shit Shit" screamed Timothy as he tried to slow down but instead crashes into the giant hill size of a nipple that belongs to this titan.

Was is the Titan going to do?
1232.title: The Sweaty Landscape

13.content:
Tumothy had laid back to relax letting the fly take control but once he heard the bustling sounds of the the big streets he instantly got up and looked around. When he was young Timothy was raised far away frok the big city but now that his whole life is finally in his own full control he looks around to see where he should begin.

There's many venues and stores and even apartments in this city he can literally to anywhere he want and thanks to his puny size he won't get caught.
He looks around and wonders what to do next.
13.title: Streets

info.brief_description: A Tiny Human in a world filled of giants tries to survive his life while also having fun
info.description:
This story is about the adventure of a miniature 18 year old boy who is the size of a mere ant. He was born in this way and had always lived with his family but one day he got a bit too careless and ended up being whisk away by the strong wind and taken on an adventure he never would've predicted.

now ofc as this is my first story ima lay down some ground rules
1- No female interactions and I will for sure will delete
2- keep the sexual interactions at a minimal they can still happen just don't be too detailed
3- no toilet fetishes
4- if possible keep Timothy unaware, if you want him to be spotted by a giant then go-ahead just add in an option to keep the unaware story going.
5- Timothy is immortal and can only die from old age
6-have fun
